ICD-10: M51.1 — Lumbar Disc Degeneration with Radiculopathy (L4-L5)
Clinical: Right-sided sciatica, reduced SLR at 45°. X-ray: L4-L5 disc space narrowing. MRI ordered.

CLINICAL ADVICE & INSTRUCTIONS
Rest:  Strict bed rest for 2 weeks. Avoid bending, lifting > 2 kg, prolonged sitting.
Physiotherapy:  Refer to Apollo Physio — 10 sessions of lumbar traction + TENS. Start after 5 days.
Investigations:  MRI Lumbar Spine (without contrast) — Apollo Radiology , same campus. Urgent.
Follow-up:  Review after 2 weeks with MRI report. Consider epidural steroid injection if conservative
management fails.
